title: Delicate Garlicky Indian Jasmine Rice Fried Rice
description: A garlicky and crisp Indian dish featuring jasmine rice, this air-fry recipe is a nostalgic and buddhist-temple-friendly option.
instructions: Heat the air fryer to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, mix together the cooked jasmine rice, minced garlic, chopped onion, grated carrot, and frozen green peas.
In a small bowl, whisk together the soy sauce, salt, and black pepper.
Pour the soy sauce mixture over the rice mixture and stir until everything is well combined.
Add the olive oil to the air fryer basket and swirl it around to coat the bottom.
Add the rice mixture to the air fryer basket and stir to combine with the olive oil.
Cook the mixture in the air fryer for 10 minutes, stirring every 2 minutes, until the rice is crispy and golden brown.
Remove the fried rice from the air fryer and serve hot.
